news.summary: Sun Communities, Inc., a real estate investment trust listed on NYSE as SUI, has released a statement declaring a quarterly distribution of $1.04 per common stock share for the second quarter of 2025. Shareholders of record on June 30, 2025, will receive the distribution on July 15, 2025. This announcement came from the company headquartered in Southfield, MI, which specializes in owning and operating manufactured housing and recreational vehicle communities.
news.headline: Sun Communities, Inc. (NYSE: SUI) declares $1.04 quarterly distribution per share for Q2 2025; payable on July 15.

news.summary: In Livermore, California, McGrath RentCorp (Nasdaq: MGRC), a prominent business-to-business rental company in North America, has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.485 per common share for the quarter that concluded on June 30, 2025. Shareholders of record on July 17, 2025, will receive the dividend on July 31, 2025. This marks the 34th consecutive year that McGrath RentCorp has increased its dividend to shareholders.
news.headline: McGrath RentCorp declares quarterly cash dividend of $0.485 per common share, payable on July 31, 2025.
US ambassador to UN: Lets demand that Hamas will surrender

news.summary: Argan, Inc. (NYSE: AGX) of Arlington, VA, has released its financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2026 ending on April 30, 2025. The company will be conducting an investor conference call on June 4, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. ET. In the quarter ended on April 30, 2025, the company reported revenues of $193,660, showing an increase of $35,978 compared to the same period in 2024 when revenues were $157,682. The gross profit for this quarter was $36,863.
news.headline: Argan, Inc. reveals Q1 2026 financial results with revenues of $193,660K & gross profit of $36,863K, showing growth from prior year.

news.summary: In Santa Monica, California, FIGS, Inc. (NYSE: FIGS) shared that CEO and Co-Founder Trina Spear and CFO Sarah Oughtred will take part in a fireside chat at the Oppenheimer 25th Annual Consumer Growth and E-Commerce Conference on June 10, 2025, beginning at 11:15 a.m. ET. This event marks an opportunity for the global healthcare apparel brand to engage with industry peers and investors. It is a chance for FIGS to showcase its dedication to enhancing the daily lives of healthcare professionals.
news.headline: FIGS, Inc. will participate in Oppenheimer 25th Annual Consumer Growth and E-Commerce Conference on June 10, 2025, at 11:15 a.m. ET. CEO and CFO will be part of a fireside chat.

news.summary: In New York, BARK, Inc. (NYSE: BARK), a prominent worldwide dog brand focused on canine happiness, disclosed its financial outcomes for the fiscal quarter and full year concluding on March 31, 2025. In the fourth quarter of 2025, the total revenue stood at $115.4 million, marking a 5.0% decrease from the previous year. Commerce revenue rose to $15.4 million, a significant uptick of 26.5%. Gross Margin also saw an improvement, rising by 80 basis points to reach 63.6%. However, there was a net loss of $(6.1) million, indicating an increase of $1.2 million compared to the prior period.
news.headline: BARK Inc. reports Q4 revenue at $115.4M (down 5%), commerce revenue at $15.4M (up 26.5%), with gross margin at 63.6%.

news.summary: Insight Enterprises, Inc. (Nasdaq: NSIT) from Chandler, Arizona, will be taking part in the Sidoti Virtual Investor Conference on June 11, 2025, at 11:30 AM ET. The company's CFO, James Morgado, will represent Insight at the event. Those interested can watch the presentation live on their website http://investor.insight.com/. Insight offers additional investor resources such as webcasts, slide presentations, and more.
news.headline: Insight Enterprises to present at Sidoti Virtual Investor Conference on June 11, 2025, 11:30 AM ET. CFO James Morgado to participate.(cors: 272)

news.summary: Planet Labs PBC, a prominent provider of Earth data, shared financial results up to April 30, 2025. Will Marshall, the CEO, announced a successful first quarter, surpassing expectations with strong execution and strategic validation. The company's stock is listed as NYSE: PL. Responding to high demand, Planet aims to continue its growth trajectory.
news.headline: Planet Labs PBC (NYSE: PL) reports strong financials for Q1 FY2026 ending April 30, 2025 with CEO positive outlook.

news.summary: South Korea-based Magnachip Semiconductor Corporation (NYSE: MX) reported that its Board of Directors has given the green light to a plan designed to strengthen independent Board supervision and management feedback. This move aligns with the Company's shift to solely focus on its Power business, along with the adoption of management's 3-3-3 strategy and introduction of new Power discrete products. The 3-3-3 strategy targets a specific set of goals but detailed specifics were not provided in the announcement.
news.headline: Magnachip Semiconductor Corp. in South Korea enhances board governance with 3-3-3 strategy amid transition to Power sector.

news.summary: Campbell, California - ChargePoint Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:CHPT), a prominent provider of networked EV charging solutions, disclosed its first-quarter fiscal results for 2026 concluding on April 30, 2025. CEO Rick Wilmer highlighted the company's advancements in key metrics such as subscription margin and overall gross margin during Q1. Additionally, partnerships and product launches were announced, anticipated to drive substantial growth.
news.headline: ChargePoint reported financial results for Q1 fiscal year 2026, with improved key metrics and partnerships for growth.

news.summary: Renatus Tactical Acquisition Corp I (RTACU) based in Coral Gables, Florida, shared today that starting on June 9, 2025, holders of the Units from the company's initial public offering can choose to trade separately the Class A ordinary shares and warrants included in the Units. The Ordinary Shares and Warrants obtained from the separated Units will be traded on the Nasdaq Global Market.
news.headline: Renatus Tactical Acquisition Corp I to start separate trading of Class A ordinary shares and warrants on Nasdaq from June 9, 2025. $RTACU #SPAC

news.summary: Verint has released its financial results for the three months ended April 30, 2025. The company reported a 6% year-over-year growth in Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) for the first quarter. Both revenue and non-GAAP diluted earnings per share exceeded expectations. This positive performance, along with a promising pipeline for their AI-driven products, indicates a strong start to the year and positions the company well to meet their annual targets. Verint is traded on the Nasdaq under the symbol VRNT.
news.headline: Verint has a strong start to FYE 2026, with 6% year-over-year ARR growth in Q1 and revenue exceeding guidance.

news.summary: Domo, listed on Nasdaq as DOMO, is set to present at the D.A. Davidson Technology Summit on June 11, 2025, at 11:20 am CT. The presentation will be live-streamed on the Domo Investor Relations website (www.domo.com/IR). Domo is a platform specializing in AI and Data Products, aiding businesses in utilizing data and AI for added value in a data-centric environment.
news.headline: Domo (Nasdaq: DOMO) to present at D.A. Davidson Technology Summit on June 11, 2025, at 11:20am CT. AI and Data Products platform.

news.summary: In Oklahoma City, Paycom Software, Inc. (NYSE: PAYC), a top provider of cloud-based human capital management software, shared findings on U.S. employees' summer leave tendencies. Paycom reported that approximately 25% of employees only request vacation time on the day of their planned absence or even weeks afterward. This behavior could be linked to ambiguous time-off rules and uneven enforcement within companies. These insights are based on a study conducted in 2023 by Paycom.
news.headline: Paycom report finds 25% of US employees delay vacation requests till the last minute. Unclear policies might be to blame.

news.summary: A medical device company, NeuroPace, Inc., headquartered in Mountain View, California, revealed on June 4, 2025, that they have secured a substantial financial boost. The company, trading on Nasdaq under the symbol NPCE, finalized a $75 million credit agreement with MidCap Financial. This arrangement comprises a $60 million term loan alongside a $15 million revolving credit line. The primary objective behind this move is to enhance the quality of life for individuals dealing with epilepsy. The funds obtained from the term loan were utilized to completely settle NeuroPace’s previous term loan taken from CRG Partners IV, L.P. Additionally, the funds availed through the revolving credit facility are earmarked for operational expenses and other corporate objectives.
news.headline: NeuroPace secures up to $75 million in debt financing with MidCap Financial; $60 million term loan and $15 million revolving credit facility.

news.summary: In Lakeland, Florida, on June 4, 2025, the Ashley Gibson Barnett Museum of Art revealed the launch of its unique new exhibit titled "Frank Lloyd Wright & the College of Tomorrow." This exclusive display was created in partnership with MCWB Architects from Albany, NY, and shines a spotlight on the renowned architect.
news.headline: Frank Lloyd Wright exhibition opens at Ashley Gibson Barnett Museum of Art at Florida Southern College, in collaboration with MCWB Architects.

news.summary: In Chico, California on June 4th, 2025, Lulu’s Fashion Lounge Holdings, Inc. announced that Tiffany R. Smith, their Chief Financial Officer, will be resigning from her position by June 30, 2025. This decision is due to personal and family-related reasons and not due to any financial disagreements within the company. Following her departure, Crystal Landsem, the Chief Executive Officer, will temporarily take over as the Interim Chief Financial Officer while still managing her CEO responsibilities. The Board of Directors will initiate a search for a permanent replacement. Smith will remain in an advisory role until the company's Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q for the fiscal quarter ending June 29, 2025, ensuring a smooth transition.
news.headline: Lulus CFO Tiffany Smith steps down June 30, 2025, for personal reasons. CEO Crystal Landsem to serve as Interim CFO. Board searching for permanent successor. Advisory role for Smith until June 29, 2025, ensuring smooth transition.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, Mondelēz International, Inc. (Nasdaq: MDLZ) published its 2024 Human Rights Due Diligence and Modern Slavery Report. The report details the company's efforts to mitigate human rights and modern slavery risks in its operations and value chain. The document outlines the progress made by Mondelēz International in preventing, detecting, and addressing these risks.
news.headline: Mondelēz International (Nasdaq: MDLZ) releases 2024 Human Rights Due Diligence and Modern Slavery Report in Chicago.

news.summary: CyberArk Software Ltd., a global leader in identity security, has disclosed plans to offer $750 million aggregate principal amount of 0.00% Convertible Senior Notes due 2030 in a private offering to qualified institutional buyers. The offering is subject to market conditions and other factors. This move is in compliance with Rule 144A under the Securities Act of 1933. CyberArk's intention to offer these Notes was announced today in Newton, Mass. and Petach Tikva, Israel.
news.headline: CyberArk announces plan to offer $750 million of Convertible Senior Notes due 2030 in private offering to institutional buyers.

news.summary: RAPT Therapeutics, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq as RAPT, based in South San Francisco, disclosed on June 4, 2025, that its management team will be attending upcoming investor conferences in June. The company is in the clinical stage and specializes in immunology, concentrating on creating innovative treatments for individuals affected by inflammatory and immunological conditions.
news.headline: RAPT Therapeutics (Nasdaq: RAPT) to attend investor conferences in June 2025 to discuss therapies for immunological diseases.

news.summary: Senseonics Holdings, Inc., a company specializing in long-term, implantable continuous glucose monitoring systems for individuals with diabetes, will be hosting an analyst event during the American Diabetes Association 85th Scientific Sessions on June 21, 2025. The event will take place at 8:00am CT at the Marriot Marquis Chicago. Interested participants can register online.
news.headline: Senseonics Holdings, Inc. to host analyst event at ADA 2025 to showcase Eversense® 365 CGM System for people with diabetes.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, XPO, a prominent freight transportation company in North America listed on NYSE as XPO, disclosed initial operating figures for its LTL segment in May 2025. The daily LTL tonnage saw a 5.7% reduction in comparison to May 2024, primarily due to a 5.0% decrease in daily shipments and a 0.7% drop in average shipment weight. It should be noted that final results for May 2025 might deviate from the outlined preliminary statistics.
news.headline: XPO reports 5.7% decrease in LTL tonnage per day in May 2025 compared to May 2024, due to reduced shipments and weight per shipment.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, 89bio, Inc. (Nasdaq: ETNB), a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company specializing in liver and cardiometabolic disease treatments, disclosed its participation in the Goldman Sachs 46th Annual Global Healthcare Conference. Scheduled for June 11, 2025, at 11:20 AM EDT, the Company’s Management will engage in a fireside chat during the event alongside one-on-one investor meetings.
news.headline: 89bio, Inc. will join Goldman Sachs 46th Annual Global Healthcare Conference on June 11, 2025 at 11:20 AM EDT for a fireside chat.

news.summary: Main Street Financial Services Corp. announced that the Board of Directors has removed Jay R. VanSickle II as President and CEO on June 3, 2025. The termination was without cause per his contract, and he is no longer on the Board. Mark R. Witmer, the current Executive Chair, has been appointed as the new President and CEO, while retaining his position as Chairman of the Board. Witmer has served as a director and Executive Chair since 2024 after the merger with Wayne Savings Bancshares, Inc. where he was on the board and Executive Chair since 2021. With about 30 years of experience in community banking, including commercial lending and mortgage banking, the Board appreciates VanSickle II’s efforts and anticipates Witmer’s guidance.
news.headline: Main Street Financial Services Corp. terminated President/CEO VanSickle and appointed Witmer to those positions on June 3, 2025.

news.summary: Strengthens sustainability and infrastructure capabilities with new expertise.
news.headline: Colliers partners with global infrastructure investment bank to enhance sustainability and infrastructure expertise.

news.summary: In Brisbane, California on June 04, 2025, Vera Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: VERA), a prominent biotech firm in late-stage clinical development concentrating on innovative therapies for patients with severe immunological conditions, disclosed their involvement in a fireside discussion at the Goldman Sachs 46th Annual Global Healthcare Conference in Miami Beach, FL from June 9 to 11, 2025. Executives from the company will engage in this chat and further engage in individual investor sessions.
news.headline: Vera Therapeutics (Nasdaq: VERA) will join Goldman Sachs 46th Annual Global Healthcare Conference in Miami Beach, FL from June 9 – 11, 2025.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, Cipher Mining Inc. (NASDAQ:CIFR) shared its May 2025 production and operations update. The update provided by the company was unaudited.
news.headline: Cipher Mining Inc. releases operational update for May 2025. Visit Globe Newswire for details.

news.summary: Gaia, Inc., a conscious media and community company based in Boulder, Colorado, is scheduled to participate in the Sidoti June Virtual Investor Conference on June 11-12, 2025. During the event, the company will be presenting and holding individual meetings with investors. Gaia is listed on the NASDAQ stock exchange under the ticker symbol GAIA.
news.headline: Gaia to present at Sidoti Virtual Investor Conference on June 11-12, 2025. Stock symbol: GAIA.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, Lyell Immunopharma, Inc. (Nasdaq: LYEL), headquartered in South San Francisco, disclosed plans for its senior management team to engage in the Goldman Sachs 46th Annual Global Healthcare Conference. The event, scheduled for June 11 at 10:00 am ET, will feature presentations and participation from the company's executives. Lyell is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical firm specializing in the development of next-generation CAR T-cell therapies aimed at treating cancer patients.
news.headline: Lyell Immunopharma (Nasdaq: LYEL) to join Goldman Sachs Global Healthcare Conference on June 11 at 10:00 am ET.

news.summary: Superior Group of Companies, Inc. revealed that its Chairman, President, and CEO, Michael Benstock, along with CFO Mike Koempel, are slated to engage in a fireside chat at the Sidoti Virtual Investor Conference on June 12, 2025, at 9:15 AM ET. Interested individuals can tune into the live webcast and its replay on the Events & Presentations page of the company's Investor Relations website. Moreover, the management plans to conduct virtual meetings on the same day.
news.headline: Superior Group of Companies CEO & CFO to speak at Sidoti Investor Conference on June 12, 2025 at 9:15 AM Eastern Time.

news.summary: PERRYSBURG, Ohio - On June 4, 2025, O-I Glass, Inc. disclosed its involvement in Wells Fargo’s 2025 Industrials and Materials Conference slated for Wednesday, June 11, 2025.
news.headline: O-I Glass to present at Wells Fargo 2025 Industrials and Materials Conference on June 11 in Perrysburg, Ohio.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, Paramount Global revealed a cash dividend of $0.05 per share for their Class A and Class B Common Stock. This decision was made by the Board of Directors. The dividend is set to be paid out on July 1, 2025, to stockholders. Paramount Global's stock is listed on NASDAQ under the tickers PARA and PARAA.
news.headline: Paramount Global declares $0.05 quarterly cash dividend per share for Class A and Class B Common Stock on July 1, 2025.

news.summary: On June 04, 2025, the Republic of Nauru and Nauru Ocean Resources Inc. (NORI) along with TMC the metals company Inc. (Nasdaq: TMC) revealed a newly revised Sponsorship Agreement. This agreement amends the original deal made in 2017 and signifies a significant partnership in the exploration of critical metals crucial for energy, defense, manufacturing, and infrastructure. NORI, the sponsored entity by the Nauruan government, collaborated with TMC, a prominent explorer of untapped reserves of essential metals. This updated agreement marks a pivotal moment in the ongoing cooperation between the two entities.
news.headline: The Government of Nauru and NORI partner with TMC for revised sponsorship agreement involving critical metals.

news.summary: In the initial quarter of fiscal year 2026, there was a significant increase in total revenue, reaching $549.0 million, marking a 22% growth compared to the previous year. During this period, 2,600 new customers were onboarded, leading to a total customer count of over 57,100 by April 30, 2025. The revenue from MongoDB Atlas experienced a 26% year-over-year rise, contributing to 72% of the total revenue for the first quarter. Additionally, an extra share repurchase authorization amounting to $800 million was granted during this period.
news.headline: MongoDB Q1 FY2026 revenue jumps 22% to $549.0M, gains 2,600 customers, totaling 57,100. Atlas revenue up 26%. $800M share buyback.

news.summary: In Bridgewater, NJ on June 4, 2025, Insmed Incorporated (Nasdaq: INSM) shared news about being a global biopharmaceutical company focused on creating top-notch therapies to enhance the lives of patients with severe illnesses. They recently disclosed the approval of an inducement.
news.headline: Insmed Incorporated grants inducement under NASDAQ rule 5635(c)(4) on June 4, 2025. (Nasdaq: INSM)

news.summary: Announced on June 4, 2025 in Grand Rapids, Michigan, Cirius Therapeutics, Inc. shared significant findings on June 4, 2025, about their groundbreaking therapies for conditions linked to insulin resistance. These conditions encompass obesity/overweight and type 2 diabetes (T2D). The company revealed promising preclinical data integrating their primary treatments.
news.headline: Cirius Therapeutics to present data on Tirzepatide at ADA Sessions, targeting patients with insulin resistance diseases.

news.summary: The company is also requesting shareholder approval for an updated omnibus plan. The plan includes amendments and restatements to better align with the company's current goals and objectives. Shareholders will be voting on this proposal during an upcoming meeting. This amended plan aims to enhance corporate governance and increase transparency. Shareholders are encouraged to review the details of the proposed amendments before the vote. The company believes that these changes are necessary for future growth and sustainability. Shareholders play a crucial role in shaping the company's direction, with a significant impact on its overall performance. The approval of this amended omnibus plan is vital for the company's continued success.
news.headline: NurExone advances ExoPTEN towards clinical trials with validated new manufacturing process, seeks shareholder approval for omnibus plan.

news.summary: In Delaware, Ohio, on June 4, 2025, Greif, Inc. revealed its fiscal second quarter 2025 results. As a prominent player in industrial packaging products and services worldwide, the company operates under the tickers GEF and GEF.B on the New York Stock Exchange. The specific numbers or figures from the announcement were not provided.
news.headline: Greif, a packaging leader, reports fiscal Q2 2025 results in Delaware; NYSE: GEF, GEF.B.

news.summary: Forestar disclosed that it will report its financial performance for the third quarter concluded on June 30, 2025, on July 22, 2025.
news.headline: Forestar Group Inc. to unveil Q3 earnings on July 22, 2025 - report for quarter ending June 30. #FOR #businessnews

news.summary: Progressing in the realm of T cell engager (TCE) technology for autoimmune disorders, Cullinan has taken a significant step forward by developing a CD19 TCE and BCMA TCE for its pipeline. This move underscores the company’s commitment to advancing innovative therapeutic solutions in this space.
news.headline: Cullinan Therapeutics obtains rights to Velinotamig from Genrix Bio for autoimmune diseases, bolstering their TCE pipeline.
